safe.name: Safe
safe.description: Sufficient system resources, tasks can be started safely

warning.name: Warning
warning.description: System resources are high, can start but attention is recommended

danger.name: Danger
danger.description: Insufficient system resources, not recommended to start tasks

memory_check.danger: Estimated memory usage will reach {percent:.1f}%, exceeding danger threshold
memory_check.warning: Estimated memory usage will reach {percent:.1f}%, elevated

cpu_check.danger: Estimated CPU usage will reach {percent:.1f}%, exceeding danger threshold
cpu_check.warning: Estimated CPU usage will reach {percent:.1f}%, elevated

temperature_check.danger: Estimated temperature will reach {temp:.1f}°C, overheating danger

process_check.danger: Too many similar processes ({count}), may cause resource competition
process_check.warning: Similar process count ({count}) has reached limit, recommend waiting
process_check.safe: Similar process count ({count}) within reasonable range

recommendations.safe: System status is good, tasks can be started safely
recommendations.danger: Danger! Not recommended to start tasks. Reasons: {reasons}
